adversarial_findings: OpenAI gpt-oss models: initially surfaced as possible July 2026 launch — confirmed December 22 2025 release; dropped as outside window
Meta Iris September production date: Meta-stated; no independent production confirmation until Q4 earnings; Iris is ASIC-class (recommendation ranking), not general-purpose GPU
Apple v. OpenAI complaint: civil case only; no finding of liability; Bloomberg Jul 11 notes internal OpenAI message was characterized as context-collapsed
